lastSession.summary: Architecture analysis + 8-task refactor: Container component (13 sites), CompanyContactBlock (5 blocks), legal page metadata unification, FAQ dedup, SectionHeading standardization, Tailwind utilities (label-xs, hover-accent), heading font scale, legal prose theme tokens.

backlog.title: Google Search Console setup for lexeu.ai
backlog.desc: Add verification token to layout.tsx metadata.verification.google, submit sitemap at https://www.lexeu.ai/sitemap.xml

backlog.title: Connect custom domain lexeu.ai to Vercel
backlog.desc: Vercel → Settings → Domains → add lexeu.ai and www.lexeu.ai. Update DNS at registrar.

backlog.title: Replace placeholder testimonials with real ones
backlog.desc: Current testimonials (Koller & Wirth, NovaTech, Studio Ferretti) are representative placeholders per the content brief. Replace with real user quotes as they come in.

backlog.title: Multilingual support: English, German, Polish
backlog.desc: Migrate to app/[locale]/ route segment + next-intl. Extract all strings to messages/en.json, then translate to de.json and pl.json. English content is now complete (privacy, terms, cookies pages done). New SectionHeading component centralizes section header text — good extraction point for i18n. Container, CompanyContactBlock, and legal-pages.config.ts are additional extraction points.

backlog.title: Populate MediaMentions section when EU press coverage exists
backlog.desc: Old Slovenian MediaMentions component deleted. Build new English one from scratch when real EU press articles are available. Each entry needs: outlet name, article title, short description, URL, favicon.

backlog.title: Add analytics
backlog.desc: Vercel Analytics or Google Analytics. Skip for now.

backlog.title: next lint and next build fail with spaces in project path
backlog.desc: next lint and Turbopack build parse path incorrectly when working dir contains spaces (iCloud Drive). Works fine on Vercel. Low priority — only affects local DX.

shipped: Refactor: Container, CompanyContactBlock, legal metadata config, FAQ dedup, SectionHeading consistency, Tailwind utilities, heading scale, theme tokens
Codebase refactor: SectionHeading, ResponsiveTable, Button variants, schema consolidation, dead code cleanup
Nav CTA price fix: €15 → €9.90 to match hero and page title
Full aikrpan remnant cleanup: new OG image, robots.txt fix, blog page translated, 5 legacy Slovenian files deleted, package name fixed
Cookie consent banner + Google Analytics: GA4 tag, consent banner with accept/reject, localStorage persistence
Nav anchor links fixed: section IDs renamed from Slovenian to English. Founder nav item removed.
Favicon refresh: white background + zoomed-in LE monogram across all sizes
Full English EU law content: all homepage sections translated from AI Krpan to LexEU
Color scheme migration: sage green → warm accent (#BF7A3B) with dark primary (#2A2520)
Models: unified category badge colors to warm accent
